headline: CCK Q2 Earnings Beat on Strong Beverage Can Volumes, '26 View Raised
summary: Crown Holdings' Q2 earnings beat estimates as beverage can volumes rise 5%. It raises the 2026 adjusted EPS outlook to $8.30-$8.50.
